title: Design RAG for 500 documents
problem: You must answer user questions over 500 internal documents. They don't fit in one prompt. Write a design: how you chunk the docs, how you store and search them, and how you inject the relevant content into the prompt at query time.
hints: Why can't you paste all 500 docs into the context window?
Chunk size trade-off: too large wastes tokens, too small loses meaning.
Retrieval = embed the question, find nearest chunks by vector similarity, inject only those.
solution: Chunk each document into ~400-token passages with ~50-token overlap. Embed every chunk once and store the vectors. At query time: embed the user's question, retrieve the top 4-5 chunks by cosine similarity, inject only those into the prompt as context. This keeps the prompt small, cheap, and grounded in real source text.
